Header files, configuration settings, functions, and build tools for JerryScript on various platforms.

## Folders
- **[curie_bsp](curie_bsp/README.md)**: Header files, configuration settings, Curie BSP-specific functions, and setup instructions for JerryScript.
- **[default](default/README.md)**: Default implementations for time, error handling, I/O, memory, and port API functions in JerryScript.
- **[esp8266](esp8266/README.md)**: Instructions, header files, JavaScript controls, native handlers, console functions, scripts, licenses, and makefiles for JerryScript on ESP8266.
- **[mbed](mbed/README.md)**: LED control, system loop functions, console and error handling, JavaScript execution, and build tools for JerryScript on mbed.
- **[mbedos5](mbed/README.mdos5)**: JavaScript bindings, event handling, build configurations, and library references for JerryScript on Mbed OS 5.
- **[nuttx-stm32f4](nuttx-stm32f4/README.md)**: Main program, configuration, build files, and setup instructions for JerryScript on NuttX STM32F4.
- **[riot-stm32f4](riot-stm32f4/README.md)**: Build configurations, instructions, and a test for JerryScript on RIOT OS with STM32F4 support.
- **[tools](tools/README.md)**: Converts JavaScript files to a C-array in a header file with build type and file ignoring options.
- **[zephyr](zephyr/README.md)**: Line input handling, JerryScript integration, console/log implementations, build configuration, and Makefiles for Zephyr.
